## Checklist

- [ ] I am **assigned** to the bounty issue (not just commenting)
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — especially Codebase Patterns
- [ ] I tested my changes locally in the browser
- [ ] My code modifies existing files (not new standalone scripts)
- [ ] Auth token uses `localStorage.getItem('auth_token')` (snake_case)
- [ ] All user data in HTML uses `escapeHtml()`
- [ ] UI text is in Spanish, code in English
- [ ] API endpoints verified against [Swagger UI](https://latanda.online/docs)
- [ ] No `console.log()` in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
